scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @quiz/web && npm run build -w @quiz/api
scripts.lint: biome check apps/web/src apps/api/src packages/ui/src packages/db packages/shared
scripts.format: biome format --write apps/web/src apps/api/src packages/ui/src packages/db packages/shared
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/db/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply quiz-db --local --config apps/api/wrangler.toml
